title: A Two-Sink Solution to the Self-Similar Euler Equations
summary: We construct the first known example of a self-similar solution to the two-dimensional incompressible Euler equations whose pseudo-velocity has more than one stagnation point. The solution is also a homogeneous steady state of the Euler equations. In contrast, any homogeneous steady state with bounded vorticity necessarily admits only a single stagnation point at the origin. Our construction develops cusps in the velocity along two lines passing through the origin, thereby allowing stagnation points other than the origin.

AI.tldr: 首次构造了二维不可压欧拉方程的自相似解，其伪速度具有多个驻点
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压欧拉方程中自相似解的性质，特别是探索是否存在具有多个驻点的解。已知有界涡度的齐次稳态解只能在原点有单个驻点，但本文要构造具有多个驻点的解。
AI.techniques: 构造性方法，通过让速度沿通过原点的两条线形成尖点(cusps)，从而允许原点以外的驻点存在
AI.main_theorems: 构造了二维不可压欧拉方程的第一个自相似解，其伪速度具有多个驻点；该解也是欧拉方程的齐次稳态；证明了有界涡度的齐次稳态只能在原点有单个驻点
AI.significance: 这是第一个具有多个驻点的自相似解，突破了有界涡度解的限制，展示了欧拉方程更丰富的解结构，对理解流体奇点形成和自相似结构有重要意义

title: Solvability of a class of evolution operators on compact Lie groups
summary: This paper provides sufficient conditions for the solvability of a class of first-order evolution operators of Vekua-type on the product of a one-dimensional torus and a compact Lie group. The conditions are expressed in terms of the time-dependent coefficients and the spectral behavior of a normalized left-invariant vector field on the group. The three-sphere case is discussed in detail, leading to more explicit criteria, and the main results are further extended to operators defined on finite products of compact Lie groups.

AI.tldr: 该论文为一类Vekua型一阶演化算子在环面与紧李群乘积上的可解性提供了充分条件。
AI.motivation: 研究Vekua型演化算子在乘积流形上的可解性问题，这类算子出现在数学物理和几何分析中，特别是在具有时间依赖系数的演化方程研究中。
AI.techniques: 利用紧李群的谱理论和左不变向量场分析，结合时间依赖系数的性质，通过傅里叶分析和谱方法建立可解性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了Vekua型演化算子在T¹×G上可解性的充分条件，条件依赖于时间系数和群上归一化左不变向量场的谱行为；特别详细讨论了三维球面情况，并将结果推广到紧李群有限乘积上。
AI.significance: 扩展了Vekua型算子的可解性理论到更一般的乘积流形，为相关演化方程的研究提供了新的分析框架，在几何分析和数学物理中有潜在应用。

title: A Regularized Framework and Admissible Solutions for Liquid-Vapor Phase Transitions in Steady Compressible Flows
summary: We investigate the well-posedness of the periodic boundary value problem for the steady compressible isentropic Navier-Stokes system under the van der Waals equation of state. The main difficulty arises from the non-monotonicity of the pressure, which induces liquid-vapor phase transitions and consequently leads to both physical instabilities and mathematical non-uniqueness of solutions. It is shown that the occurrence of a phase transition is determined by whether the integral average of the specific volume lies inside the gas-liquid coexistence region defined by the Maxwell construction. By introducing an artificial viscosity, we construct an approximate system. When the integral average of the specific volume falls within the Maxwell region, the approximate solution converges, as the artificial viscosity tends to zero, to the equilibrium states given by Maxwell's construction, with the diffuse interface sharpening into a discontinuity. Conversely, if the integral average of the specific volume lies outside this region, the limiting solution remains outside as well, meaning that no phase transition occurs. These results demonstrate that the non-monotonicity of the pressure, combined with the condition that the integral average of the specific volume belongs to the Maxwell region, can act as a nucleation mechanism for phase transitions in the isentropic gas-liquid problem. Furthermore, the proposed approximation not only offers a regularized framework for describing phase transitions but also provides, from a rigorous mathematical viewpoint, a definition of admissible solutions related to phase transitions. The detailed proof relies on the artificial viscosity method, the calculus of variations, the anti-derivative technique, phase-plane analysis, and the level-set method.

AI.tldr: 证明了在范德瓦尔斯状态方程下，稳态可压缩等熵Navier-Stokes周期边值问题的适定性，揭示了相变发生的条件由比容积分平均值是否位于Maxwell共存区决定。
AI.motivation: 研究范德瓦尔斯状态方程下稳态可压缩等熵Navier-Stokes系统的周期边值问题适定性，主要挑战在于压力的非单调性会引发液-气相变，导致物理不稳定性和数学解的非唯一性。
AI.techniques: 人工粘性方法、变分法、反导数技术、相平面分析、水平集方法，通过引入人工粘性构造近似系统。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 相变发生与否取决于比容积分平均值是否位于Maxwell构造定义的气液共存区；2. 当积分平均值在Maxwell区内时，近似解收敛到Maxwell构造给出的平衡态，扩散界面锐化为间断；3. 当积分平均值在区外时，极限解也保持在区外，不发生相变。
AI.significance: 为描述相变提供了正则化框架，从严格数学角度给出了与相变相关的容许解定义，证明了压力非单调性与比容积分平均值条件可作为等熵气液问题中相变的成核机制。

title: Conformal Metrics on the Disk with Prescribed Negative Gaussian Curvature and Boundary Geodesic Curvature
summary: We study the problem of prescribing the Gaussian curvature on the disk and the geodesic curvature on its boundary via a conformal change of the metric. In this paper the case of negative Gaussian curvature is treated, a regime for which the bubbling behavior of approximate solutions is not so well understood. This is due to the possible appearance of blow-up solutions with diverging length and area. We give an existence result under assumptions on the curvatures which are somewhat natural, in view of some obstructions inherent to the problem. Our strategy is variational and relies on the study of certain families of approximated problems. By performing a refined blow-up analysis for solutions with bounded Morse index, we conclude compactness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在圆盘上通过共形变换同时规定高斯曲率和边界测地曲率的问题，特别处理了负高斯曲率情形，给出了在自然假设下的存在性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究在圆盘上通过共形变换同时规定内部高斯曲率和边界测地曲率的问题，特别关注负高斯曲率情形。这一情形中近似解的"气泡"行为较难理解，因为可能出现长度和面积发散的爆破解。需要克服该问题固有的某些障碍。
AI.techniques: 变分方法，研究近似问题族，对有界Morse指数的解进行精细的爆破分析，最终证明紧致性。
AI.main_theorems: 在关于曲率的自然假设下，证明了存在性结果。这些假设考虑了问题固有的障碍，通过变分方法和紧致性分析得到了解的存在性。
AI.significance: 深入理解了负高斯曲率情形下的爆破行为，解决了该情形下存在性问题的理论空白，为同时规定内部和边界曲率的共形几何问题提供了新的理论工具。

title: A Degenerate Elliptic System Solvable by Transport: A Cautionary Example
summary: We exhibit a one-parameter family of first-order real elliptic systems on the plane whose ellipticity constant degenerates to zero as $δ\to 0$, with condition number $κ= O(δ^{-2})$. For any fixed elliptic solver operating at finite precision, the parameter $δ$ can be chosen small enough to defeat the solver; no uniform numerical scheme based on the ellipticity constant alone can handle the entire family. Despite this, every member of the family is explicitly solvable -- and its initial value problem well posed -- by elementary means once a transport-theoretic invariant is identified. The cost of the transport solution is independent of $δ$. The example serves as a cautionary tale: the ellipticity constant alone does not determine the practical difficulty of a first-order PDE. Before invoking an elliptic solver, one should compute the transport obstruction $G$; its vanishing -- or smallness -- signals structure that standard elliptic methods miss entirely.

AI.tldr: 揭示了仅依赖椭圆常数无法确定一阶PDE实际计算难度，提出了基于输运障碍G的新诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 研究一阶实椭圆系统的数值求解问题，发现传统基于椭圆常数的数值方法存在根本局限性：即使椭圆常数趋于零（条件数κ→∞），某些系统仍可通过输运理论显式求解。
AI.techniques: 构造单参数椭圆系统族，分析椭圆常数退化行为，引入输运理论不变量G，建立输运障碍诊断方法，对比传统椭圆求解器与输运方法的计算复杂度。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了椭圆常数随δ→0退化至零的单参数椭圆系统族，条件数κ=O(δ^{-2})；2. 证明任何固定精度的椭圆求解器都会被足够小的δ击败；3. 发现所有系统成员都可通过识别输运不变量显式求解，且输运解的计算成本与δ无关；4. 提出了输运障碍G的诊断框架。
AI.significance: 挑战了传统PDE数值分析中过度依赖椭圆常数的范式，揭示了输运结构在椭圆系统求解中的关键作用，为设计更鲁棒的数值方法提供了新视角，对计算数学和PDE理论有重要启示。

title: Uniqueness and Zeroth-Order Analysis of Weak Solutions to the Non-cutoff Boltzmann equation
summary: We establish the uniqueness of large solutions to the non-cutoff Boltzmann equation with moderate soft potentials. Specifically, the weak solution $F=μ+μ^{\frac{1}{2}}f$ is unique as long as it has finite energy, in the sense that the norm $\|f\|_{L^\infty_t L^{r}_{x,v}}+\|f\|_{L^\infty_t L^2_{x,v}}$ remains bounded (arbitrary large) for some sufficiently large $r>0$. Our approach applies dilated dyadic decompositions in phase space $(v,ξ,η)$ to capture hypoellipticity and to reduce the fractional derivative structure $(-Δ_v)^{s}$ of the Boltzmann collision operator to zeroth order. The difficulties posed by the large solution are overcome through the negative-order hypoelliptic estimate that gains integrability in $(t,x)$.

AI.tldr: 建立了非截断玻尔兹曼方程在中等软势下大解的唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究非截断玻尔兹曼方程大解的唯一性问题，特别是针对中等软势情形，解决大解情况下解的唯一性证明困难
AI.techniques: 采用相空间$(v,ξ,η)$的扩张二进分解来捕捉亚椭圆性，将玻尔兹曼碰撞算子的分数阶导数结构$(-Δ_v)^{s}$降为零阶，利用负阶亚椭圆估计克服大解带来的困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了弱解$F=μ+μ^{\frac{1}{2}}f$的唯一性，只要它具有有限能量且范数$\|f\|_{L^\infty_t L^{r}_{x,v}}+\|f\|_{L^\infty_t L^2_{x,v}}$对足够大的$r>0$有界（可任意大）
AI.significance: 为非截断玻尔兹曼方程大解理论提供了重要进展，克服了传统方法处理大解的困难，为研究更一般的解空间奠定了基础

title: Completeness theorems on the boundary for a parabolic equation
summary: Let $\{v_α\}$ be a system of polynomial solutions of the parabolic equation $a_{hk}\partial_{x_{h}x_{k}}u - \partial_t u =0$ in a bounded $C^1$-cylinder $Ω_{T}$ contained in $\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$. Here $a_{hk}\partial_{x_{h}x_{k}}$ is an elliptic operator with real constant coefficients. We prove that $\{v_α\}$ is complete in $L^{p}(Σ')$, where $Σ'$ is the parabolic boundary of $Ω_{T}$. Similar results are proved for the adjoint equation $a_{hk}\partial_{x_{h}x_{k}} u+ \partial_t u =0$.

AI.tldr: 证明了抛物型方程多项式解系统在柱体抛物边界上的L^p完备性
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型方程多项式解系统在边界上的完备性，这是抛物型方程理论中的基本问题，与椭圆方程中多项式完备性类似但更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 利用抛物型方程理论、椭圆算子性质、多项式逼近方法、边界值问题分析，可能涉及抛物型势理论和函数空间理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了抛物方程a_{hk}∂_{x_hx_k}u - ∂_t u = 0的多项式解系统{v_α}在柱体Ω_T的抛物边界Σ'上L^p完备；对伴随方程a_{hk}∂_{x_hx_k}u + ∂_t u = 0也有类似结果
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆方程多项式完备性理论到抛物情形，为抛物型方程边界值问题提供理论基础，在抛物型方程数值方法和逼近理论中有应用价值

title: On the Robin problem for the Laplace equation in multiply connected domains
summary: This paper complements the existing theory developed in [5] for the Dirichlet and Neumann problems for the Laplace equation, in multiply connected domains. Within the framework of layer potential methods, we study the Laplace equation under Robin boundary conditions, representing the solutions by means of a double layer potential. We observe that the classical approach searches the solutions in terms of a single layer potential.

AI.tldr: 本文在多重连通区域中，将层势方法应用于拉普拉斯方程的Robin边值问题，采用双层势表示解，区别于经典的单层势方法。
AI.motivation: 已有文献[5]建立了多重连通区域中拉普拉斯方程的Dirichlet和Neumann问题的理论，本文旨在补充该理论，研究Robin边界条件下的拉普拉斯方程，扩展层势方法的应用范围。
AI.techniques: 采用层势方法（layer potential methods），特别是双层势（double layer potential）表示解，区别于经典的单层势（single layer potential）方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在多重连通区域中，建立了拉普拉斯方程Robin边值问题的双层势表示理论，为这类问题提供了新的分析框架。
AI.significance: 扩展了层势方法在椭圆型偏微分方程边值问题中的应用，为多重连通区域中的Robin问题提供了新的理论工具，完善了拉普拉斯方程边值问题的完整理论体系。

title: Quantitative enstrophy bounds for measure vorticities
summary: We consider the two-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations with measure initial vorticity. By means of improved Nash inequalities, we establish quantitative estimates for the enstrophy depending on the absolute vorticity decay on balls. The bounds are optimal in several aspects and yield to a conjecturally sharp rate of the dissipation in the Delort's class.

AI.tldr: 通过改进的Nash不等式，建立了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在测度初值涡度下拟涡能（enstrophy）的定量估计，得到了Delort类中耗散率的猜想最优速率。
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在测度初值涡度下的行为，特别是Delort类解的性质。这类问题源于涡度作为测度的初值条件，在数学流体力学中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 改进的Nash不等式方法，用于建立拟涡能的定量估计；分析涡度在球上的绝对衰减性质；优化估计技术以获得最优边界。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了拟涡能依赖于涡度在球上绝对衰减的定量估计；证明了这些边界在多个方面是最优的；得到了Delort类中耗散率的猜想最优速率。
AI.significance: 为二维Navier-Stokes方程在测度初值下的理论提供了重要进展，特别是对Delort类解的性质给出了精确的定量描述；改进的Nash不等式方法可能在相关PDE问题中有更广泛的应用。

title: Solving Dirichlet problem on unbounded uniform domains by using sphericalization techniques
summary: Within the setting of metric spaces equipped with a doubling measure and supporting a $p$-Poincaré inequality, establishing existence of solutions to Dirichlet problem in a bounded domain in such a metric space is accomplished via direct methods of calculus of variation and the use of a Maz'ya type inequality, which is a consequence of the Poincaré inequality. However, when the domain and its boundary are unbounded, such a method is unavailable. In this paper, using the technique of sphericalization developed in the prior paper~[32], we establish the existence of solutions to the Dirichlet boundary value problem for $p$-harmonic functions in unbounded uniform domains with unbounded boundary when $1<p<\infty$. We also explore the issue of whether such solutions are unique by considering $p$-parabolicity and $p$-hyperbolicity properties of the domain.

AI.tldr: 在度量空间上建立无界区域中p-调和函数Dirichlet问题解的存在性
AI.motivation: 在有界区域中，利用加倍测度和p-Poincaré不等式，可以通过变分法和Maz'ya型不等式建立Dirichlet问题解的存在性。然而，当区域及其边界无界时，这种方法不再适用。本文旨在解决无界区域中p-调和函数Dirichlet问题解的存在性问题。
AI.techniques: 主要使用球面化技术（sphericalization），这是作者先前论文[32]中发展的方法。该技术将无界度量空间转化为紧致度量空间，从而能够应用有界区域中的理论框架。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在具有无界边界的无界一致区域中，建立了p-调和函数Dirichlet问题解的存在性（当1<p<∞时）。2. 通过考虑区域的p-抛物性和p-双曲性，探讨了这类解的唯一性问题。
AI.significance: 将p-调和函数理论从有界区域扩展到无界区域，填补了度量空间分析中的重要空白。球面化技术为处理无界问题提供了新的方法论，对非线性位势理论和度量空间上的偏微分方程研究有重要贡献。

title: Fine regularity of fractional harmonic maps and applications
summary: In this paper, we derive several regularity results for harmonic mappings into Euclidean spheres associated with rather general energies related to fractional Sobolev spaces. These maps generalize families of maps introduced by Da Lio, Rivière and Schikorra and are related to harmonic maps with free boundaries. In our context, there is in general no monotonicity formula, which prevents the use of some classical methods. Despite this limitation, under natural assumptions on a Gagliardo-type energy, we succeed in proving a variety of small energy regularity results and improve on known results, even in the isotropic case for which some monotonicity formula is available. To this end, we exploit recent developments in the regularity theory of nonlocal equations and as a by-product, we explain how these results apply to classes of harmonic maps with free boundary and lead to new potential-theoretic estimates. As another application, we obtain higher differentiability results for the fractional harmonic map heat flow.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了分数阶Sobolev空间相关能量下球面调和映射的多种正则性结果，克服了单调性公式缺失的困难。
AI.motivation: 研究广义分数阶Sobolev空间能量下的调和映射正则性，这类映射推广了Da Lio、Rivière和Schikorra引入的映射族，与自由边界调和映射相关，但缺乏单调性公式这一经典工具。
AI.techniques: 利用非局部方程正则性理论的最新进展，采用Gagliardo型能量假设，发展小能量正则性方法，克服单调性公式缺失的限制。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了多种小能量正则性结果，改进了已知结果（包括各向同性情形），获得了自由边界调和映射的新位势理论估计，以及分数调和映射热流的高阶可微性结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了调和映射正则性理论，为缺乏单调性公式的情形提供了新方法，对自由边界问题和分数阶发展方程有重要应用价值。
